query_nl: Detect a ransomware that encrypts files and uses the string CryptEncrypt
yara_rule: rule Detect_WannaCry_CryptEncrypt { meta: description="Detects WannaCry ransomware via CryptEncrypt API" author="Manual" date="2026-01-10" strings: $api = "CryptEncrypt" $ext = ".WNCRY" $msg = "WannaCry" condition: $api and ($ext or $msg) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un ransomware qui renomme les fichiers avec l'extension .locked
yara_rule: rule Detect_LockBit_Extension { meta: description="Detects LockBit via .locked extension" author="Manual" date="2026-01-10" strings: $ext1 = ".locked" fullword $ext2 = ".lockbit" fullword $note = "LockBit_Readme.txt" condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: i need a rule to catch malware that downloads stuff from the internet and hides itself
yara_rule: rule Detect_Generic_Downloader { meta: description="Detects generic downloader trojan" strings: $url1 = "http://" $url2 = "https://" $dl = "URLDownloadToFile" $hide = "SetFileAttributesA" condition: ($url1 or $url2) and $dl and $hide }
label: malicious

query_nl: Règle YARA pour détecter un keylogger qui capture les frappes clavier
yara_rule: rule Detect_Keylogger_API { meta: description="Detects keylogger via Windows API" author="Manual" strings: $api1 = "SetWindowsHookEx" $api2 = "GetAsyncKeyState" $api3 = "GetKeyboardState" $log = "keylog" nocase condition: 2 of ($api1, $api2, $api3) or $log }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect pe file that injects code into other processes using CreateRemoteThread
yara_rule: rule Detect_Process_Injection_CRT { meta: description="Detects process injection via CreateRemoteThread" strings: $api1 = "CreateRemoteThread" $api2 = "VirtualAllocEx" $api3 = "WriteProcessMemory" $api4 = "OpenProcess" condition: pe.is_pe and 3 of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Je veux détecter un virus qui se propage via clé USB et crée des fichiers autorun
yara_rule: rule Detect_USB_Worm_Autorun { meta: description="Detects USB worm using autorun.inf" strings: $autorun = "autorun.inf" nocase $open = "open=" $shell = "shell\\open\\command" condition: $autorun and ($open or $shell) }
label: malicious

query_nl: find malware that uses base64 encoding to hide its payload and decodes it at runtime
yara_rule: rule Detect_Base64_Obfuscation { meta: description="Detects base64-encoded payload execution" strings: $b64 = /[A-Za-z0-9+\/]{40,}={0,2}/ $decode = "CryptStringToBinary" $ps = "FromBase64String" condition: ($b64 and $decode) or $ps }
label: malicious

query_nl: détecter un malware qui désactive l'antivirus Windows Defender
yara_rule: rule Detect_Disable_Defender { meta: description="Detects attempt to disable Windows Defender" strings: $cmd1 = "Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring" nocase $cmd2 = "sc stop WinDefend" nocase $cmd3 = "DisableAntiSpyware" $reg = "Windows Defender\\\\Real-Time Protection" condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Write a YARA rule to detect Emotet banking trojan communicating with C2 servers
yara_rule: rule Detect_Emotet_C2 { meta: description="Detects Emotet C2 communication patterns" author="Manual" strings: $mutex = "Global\\\\Emotet" nocase $pdb = "emotet" nocase $useragent = "Mozilla/4.0" $inet = "InternetOpenUrl" condition: pe.is_pe and (($mutex or $pdb) and ($useragent or $inet)) }
label: malicious

query_nl: je cherche a identifier un ransomware de type double extorsion qui exfiltre avant de chiffrer
yara_rule: rule Detect_DoubleExtortion_Ransomware { meta: description="Detects double extortion ransomware pattern" strings: $exfil = "curl.exe" $compress = "7z.exe" $encrypt = "CryptEncrypt" $note1 = "YOUR FILES ARE ENCRYPTED" nocase $note2 = "double extortion" nocase condition: ($exfil or $compress) and $encrypt and any of ($note1, $note2) }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect a trojan that modifies the Windows registry for persistence at startup
yara_rule: rule Detect_Registry_Persistence { meta: description="Detects registry-based persistence mechanism" strings: $reg1 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Run" $reg2 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\RunOnce" $api = "RegSetValueEx" condition: ($reg1 or $reg2) and $api }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un malware qui utilise PowerShell pour télécharger et exécuter du code
yara_rule: rule Detect_PowerShell_Download_Exec { meta: description="Detects PowerShell download cradle" strings: $ps1 = "powershell" nocase $dl1 = "DownloadString" $dl2 = "DownloadFile" $iex = "IEX" $invoke = "Invoke-Expression" condition: $ps1 and ($dl1 or $dl2) and ($iex or $invoke) }
label: malicious

query_nl: rule to detect a rootkit that hooks system calls to hide processes
yara_rule: rule Detect_Rootkit_SSDT_Hook { meta: description="Detects rootkit via SSDT hook signatures" strings: $ssdt = "\\\\\\\\Device\\\\\\\\PhysicalMemory" $zwq = "ZwQuerySystemInformation" $hook = { 90 90 90 E9 ?? ?? ?? ?? } $driver = "\\\\.\\\\PhysicalDrive" condition: ($ssdt and $zwq) or ($hook and $driver) }
label: malicious

query_nl: un simple virus qui copie des fichiers et se réplique sur le réseau
yara_rule: rule Detect_Network_Worm_Replication { meta: description="Detects worm replication via network shares" strings: $copy = "CopyFile" $net1 = "\\\\\\\\*\\\\*" $net2 = "net use" $ipc = "IPC$" condition: $copy and ($net1 or $net2 or $ipc) }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect spyware that takes screenshots and sends them to a remote server
yara_rule: rule Detect_Screenshot_Spyware { meta: description="Detects spyware capturing screenshots" strings: $api1 = "BitBlt" $api2 = "GetDesktopWindow" $api3 = "CreateCompatibleBitmap" $send = "send" $ftp = "ftp" nocase condition: 2 of ($api1, $api2, $api3) and ($send or $ftp) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un malware de type RAT qui ouvre un backdoor sur le port 4444
yara_rule: rule Detect_RAT_Backdoor_Port4444 { meta: description="Detects RAT opening backdoor on port 4444" strings: $port = { 11 5C } $bind = "bind" $listen = "listen" $shell = "cmd.exe" $nc = "netcat" nocase condition: ($bind and $listen) and ($shell or $nc) }
label: malicious

query_nl: YARA rule for detecting Mirai botnet malware on IoT devices
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mirai_Botnet { meta: description="Detects Mirai botnet IoT malware" strings: $str1 = "/bin/busybox" $str2 = "MIRAI" $str3 = "telnet" $kill = "kill" $exec = "/bin/sh" condition: $str1 and ($str2 or ($str3 and $kill and $exec)) }
label: malicious

query_nl: détecter un crypto-mineur qui utilise le CPU à fond pour miner du Monero
yara_rule: rule Detect_XMRig_Cryptominer { meta: description="Detects XMRig Monero CPU miner" strings: $xmr1 = "xmrig" nocase $xmr2 = "monero" nocase $pool = "pool.minexmr.com" $wallet = "donate.xmrig.com" $cpu = "--max-cpu-usage" condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: find malware that uses DLL side-loading to execute malicious code
yara_rule: rule Detect_DLL_Sideloading { meta: description="Detects DLL side-loading technique" strings: $legit1 = "version.dll" nocase $legit2 = "wininet.dll" nocase $load = "LoadLibrary" $pe_char = { 4D 5A } condition: $pe_char at 0 and $load and ($legit1 or $legit2) and filesize < 500KB }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un cheval de Troie bancaire qui intercepte les transactions en ligne
yara_rule: rule Detect_Zeus_Banking_Trojan { meta: description="Detects Zeus banking trojan web inject" strings: $inject1 = "webinject" nocase $inject2 = "formgrab" nocase $bank1 = "paypal" nocase $bank2 = "bankofamerica" nocase $hook = "HttpSendRequest" condition: ($inject1 or $inject2) and ($bank1 or $bank2) and $hook }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect legitimate Windows calculator application
yara_rule: rule Benign_Windows_Calculator { meta: description="Identifies legitimate Windows calculator" strings: $name = "calc.exe" $pub = "Microsoft Corporation" $desc = "Windows Calculator" condition: $name and $pub and $desc and filesize < 1MB }
label: benign

query_nl: règle pour identifier un fichier PDF normal sans code malveillant
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_PDF { meta: description="Identifies clean PDF without malicious content" strings: $pdf_header = "%PDF-" $eof = "%%EOF" $nojs = "JavaScript" condition: $pdf_header at 0 and $eof and not $nojs }
label: benign

query_nl: identify a normal text file with no executable content
yara_rule: rule Benign_Plain_Text_File { meta: description="Identifies benign plain text file" strings: $no_pe = { 4D 5A } $no_elf = { 7F 45 4C 46 } condition: not $no_pe at 0 and not $no_elf at 0 and filesize < 10MB }
label: benign

query_nl: Fichier image JPG légitime sans code caché
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_JPEG { meta: description="Identifies clean JPEG image file" strings: $jpg_magic = { FF D8 FF } $jpg_end = { FF D9 } condition: $jpg_magic at 0 and $jpg_end }
label: benign

query_nl: detect a normal Python script with no malicious imports
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_Python_Script { meta: description="Identifies benign Python script" strings: $py = "#!/usr/bin/python" $import_os = "import os" $no_exec = "subprocess.call" $no_socket = "import socket" condition: ($py or $import_os) and not $no_exec and not $no_socket }
label: benign

query_nl: Detect ransomware that drops a ransom note named README.txt
yara_rule: rule Detect_Ransom_Note_README { meta: description="Detects ransomware dropping README ransom note" strings: $note1 = "README.txt" $note2 = "YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN ENCRYPTED" nocase $note3 = "bitcoin" nocase $note4 = "BTC" condition: $note1 and ($note2 or $note3 or $note4) }
label: malicious

query_nl: يريد الكشف عن برنامج فدية يستخدم التشفير AES
yara_rule: rule Detect_AES_Ransomware_Generic { meta: description="Detects ransomware using AES encryption" strings: $aes1 = "AES" $aes2 = "CryptEncrypt" $aes3 = { 52 69 6A 6E 64 61 65 6C } $ext = ".enc" condition: ($aes1 or $aes3) and $aes2 and $ext }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect malware communicating over DNS tunneling to exfiltrate data
yara_rule: rule Detect_DNS_Tunneling { meta: description="Detects DNS tunneling for data exfiltration" strings: $dns1 = "DnsQuery" $dns2 = "gethostbyname" $long_subdomain = /[a-zA-Z0-9]{30,}\.[a-z]{2,6}/ $iodine = "iodine" nocase condition: ($dns1 or $dns2) and ($long_subdomain or $iodine) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un malware qui utilise des techniques anti-analyse pour éviter les sandbox
yara_rule: rule Detect_AntiSandbox_Evasion { meta: description="Detects anti-sandbox evasion techniques" strings: $sleep = "Sleep" $tick = "GetTickCount" $vm1 = "VMware" nocase $vm2 = "VirtualBox" nocase $debug = "IsDebuggerPresent" $mouse = "GetCursorPos" condition: ($vm1 or $vm2 or $debug) and ($sleep or $tick or $mouse) }
label: malicious

query_nl: quick rule to catch exe that deletes shadow copies to prevent recovery
yara_rule: rule Detect_ShadowCopy_Deletion { meta: description="Detects shadow copy deletion to prevent recovery" strings: $vss1 = "vssadmin delete shadows" nocase $vss2 = "wmic shadowcopy delete" nocase $vss3 = "bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled no" nocase condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un spyware mobile qui accède aux contacts et SMS
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mobile_Spyware_Contacts { meta: description="Detects Android spyware accessing contacts/SMS" strings: $perm1 = "READ_CONTACTS" $perm2 = "READ_SMS" $perm3 = "ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" $upload = "uploadData" $srv = "BackgroundService" condition: 3 of ($perm1, $perm2, $perm3) and ($upload or $srv) }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect file that uses mimikatz to dump Windows credentials from LSASS
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mimikatz_Credential_Dump { meta: description="Detects Mimikatz credential dumping tool" strings: $mimi1 = "mimikatz" nocase $mimi2 = "sekurlsa" nocase $lsass = "lsass" nocase $priv = "privilege::debug" nocase $pass = "sekurlsa::logonpasswords" nocase condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: file normal de configuration système Windows sans activité suspecte
yara_rule: rule Benign_Windows_Config_File { meta: description="Identifies benign Windows configuration file" strings: $xml = "<?xml version" $win = "Windows" $config = "configuration" $no_script = "<script" $no_exec = "cmd.exe" condition: $xml and $win and $config and not $no_script and not $no_exec }
label: benign

query_nl: YARA rule to detect Agent Tesla infostealer exfiltrating via SMTP
yara_rule: rule Detect_AgentTesla_SMTP_Exfil { meta: description="Detects Agent Tesla infostealer SMTP exfiltration" strings: $tesla1 = "AgentTesla" nocase $smtp1 = "smtp.gmail.com" $smtp2 = "MAIL FROM:" $key = "GetAsyncKeyState" $clip = "GetClipboardData" condition: ($tesla1 or ($smtp1 and $smtp2)) and ($key or $clip) }
label: malicious

query_nl: détecter un malware qui modifie le fichier hosts pour rediriger le trafic
yara_rule: rule Detect_Hosts_File_Modification { meta: description="Detects malware modifying Windows hosts file" strings: $hosts = "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\drivers\\\\etc\\\\hosts" $write = "WriteFile" $redirect1 = "127.0.0.1" $redirect2 = "0.0.0.0" condition: $hosts and $write and ($redirect1 or $redirect2) }
label: malicious

query_nl: i need to detect a wiper malware that overwrites MBR to destroy the system
yara_rule: rule Detect_MBR_Wiper { meta: description="Detects MBR wiper malware" strings: $mbr = "\\\\.\\\\PhysicalDrive0" $write = "WriteFile" $zeros = { 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 } $wipe = "DeviceIoControl" condition: $mbr and ($write or $wipe) and $zeros }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter Cobalt Strike beacon utilisé par des attaquants APT
yara_rule: rule Detect_CobaltStrike_Beacon { meta: description="Detects Cobalt Strike beacon artifact" strings: $pipe = "\\\\.\\\\pipe\\\\msagent_" $cs1 = "beacon" nocase $cs2 = "cobaltstrike" nocase $sleep = { 48 83 EC 20 B8 01 00 00 00 } $config = { 69 68 69 68 69 6B } condition: ($pipe or $cs2 or $cs1) and ($sleep or $config) }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect dropper that extracts and runs an embedded executable from its resources
yara_rule: rule Detect_Resource_Dropper { meta: description="Detects dropper extracting PE from resources" strings: $res1 = "FindResource" $res2 = "LoadResource" $res3 = "LockResource" $write = "WriteFile" $exec = "CreateProcess" condition: pe.is_pe and 3 of ($res1, $res2, $res3) and $write and $exec }
label: malicious

query_nl: simple document Word normal sans macro ni code VBA
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_Word_Document { meta: description="Identifies clean Word document without macros" strings: $docx = "word/document.xml" $no_macro = "vbaProject.bin" $no_auto = "AutoOpen" condition: $docx and not $no_macro and not $no_auto }
label: benign

query_nl: detect a fileless malware that runs entirely in memory using reflective DLL injection
yara_rule: rule Detect_Reflective_DLL_Injection { meta: description="Detects reflective DLL injection technique" strings: $reflect1 = "ReflectiveLoader" $reflect2 = { 52 65 66 6C 65 63 74 69 76 65 4C 6F 61 64 65 72 } $valloc = "VirtualAlloc" $nocrt = { 55 8B EC 83 EC } condition: ($reflect1 or $reflect2) and $valloc }
label: malicious

query_nl: Detect ransomware that creates a mutex to avoid double infection
yara_rule: rule Detect_Ransomware_Mutex { meta: description="Detects ransomware using mutex for single instance" strings: $mutex1 = "CreateMutex" $mutex2 = "Global\\\\" $encrypt = "CryptEncrypt" $note = "README" condition: $mutex1 and $mutex2 and ($encrypt or $note) }

query_nl: détecter un malware qui effectue un scan de ports sur le réseau local

query_nl: Build a rule to flag mirai botnet malware on iot devices
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mirai_Botnet { meta: description="Detects Mirai botnet IoT malware" strings: $str1 = "/bin/busybox" $str2 = "MIRAI" $str3 = "telnet" $kill = "kill" $exec = "/bin/sh" condition: $str1 and ($str2 or ($str3 and $kill and $exec)) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Créer une règle YARA pour un crypto-mineur qui utilise le cpu à fond pour miner du monero
yara_rule: rule Detect_XMRig_Cryptominer { meta: description="Detects XMRig Monero CPU miner" strings: $xmr1 = "xmrig" nocase $xmr2 = "monero" nocase $pool = "pool.minexmr.com" $wallet = "donate.xmrig.com" $cpu = "--max-cpu-usage" condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Create a detection rule that malware that uses dll side-loading to execute malicious code
yara_rule: rule Detect_DLL_Sideloading { meta: description="Detects DLL side-loading technique" strings: $legit1 = "version.dll" nocase $legit2 = "wininet.dll" nocase $load = "LoadLibrary" $pe_char = { 4D 5A } condition: $pe_char at 0 and $load and ($legit1 or $legit2) and filesize < 500KB }
label: malicious

query_nl: Créer une règle YARA pour un cheval de troie bancaire qui intercepte les transactions en ligne
yara_rule: rule Detect_Zeus_Banking_Trojan { meta: description="Detects Zeus banking trojan web inject" strings: $inject1 = "webinject" nocase $inject2 = "formgrab" nocase $bank1 = "paypal" nocase $bank2 = "bankofamerica" nocase $hook = "HttpSendRequest" condition: ($inject1 or $inject2) and ($bank1 or $bank2) and $hook }
label: malicious

query_nl: Detect samples that ransomware that drops a ransom note named readme.txt
yara_rule: rule Detect_Ransom_Note_README { meta: description="Detects ransomware dropping README ransom note" strings: $note1 = "README.txt" $note2 = "YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN ENCRYPTED" nocase $note3 = "bitcoin" nocase $note4 = "BTC" condition: $note1 and ($note2 or $note3 or $note4) }
label: malicious

query_nl: يريد الكشف عن برنامج فدية يستخدم التشفير AES
yara_rule: rule Detect_AES_Ransomware_Generic { meta: description="Detects ransomware using AES encryption" strings: $aes1 = "AES" $aes2 = "CryptEncrypt" $aes3 = { 52 69 6A 6E 64 61 65 6C } $ext = ".enc" condition: ($aes1 or $aes3) and $aes2 and $ext }
label: malicious

query_nl: Create a detection rule that malware communicating over dns tunneling to exfiltrate data
yara_rule: rule Detect_DNS_Tunneling { meta: description="Detects DNS tunneling for data exfiltration" strings: $dns1 = "DnsQuery" $dns2 = "gethostbyname" $long_subdomain = /[a-zA-Z0-9]{30,}\.[a-z]{2,6}/ $iodine = "iodine" nocase condition: ($dns1 or $dns2) and ($long_subdomain or $iodine) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter les fichiers qui un malware qui utilise des techniques anti-analyse pour éviter les sandbox
yara_rule: rule Detect_AntiSandbox_Evasion { meta: description="Detects anti-sandbox evasion techniques" strings: $sleep = "Sleep" $tick = "GetTickCount" $vm1 = "VMware" nocase $vm2 = "VirtualBox" nocase $debug = "IsDebuggerPresent" $mouse = "GetCursorPos" condition: ($vm1 or $vm2 or $debug) and ($sleep or $tick or $mouse) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Find files that quick rule to catch exe that deletes shadow copies to prevent recovery
yara_rule: rule Detect_ShadowCopy_Deletion { meta: description="Detects shadow copy deletion to prevent recovery" strings: $vss1 = "vssadmin delete shadows" nocase $vss2 = "wmic shadowcopy delete" nocase $vss3 = "bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled no" nocase condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Construire une règle pour trouver un spyware mobile qui accède aux contacts et sms
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mobile_Spyware_Contacts { meta: description="Detects Android spyware accessing contacts/SMS" strings: $perm1 = "READ_CONTACTS" $perm2 = "READ_SMS" $perm3 = "ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" $upload = "uploadData" $srv = "BackgroundService" condition: 3 of ($perm1, $perm2, $perm3) and ($upload or $srv) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Write a YARA rule to file that uses mimikatz to dump windows credentials from lsass
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mimikatz_Credential_Dump { meta: description="Detects Mimikatz credential dumping tool" strings: $mimi1 = "mimikatz" nocase $mimi2 = "sekurlsa" nocase $lsass = "lsass" nocase $priv = "privilege::debug" nocase $pass = "sekurlsa::logonpasswords" nocase condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Write a YARA rule to yara rule to detect agent tesla infostealer exfiltrating via smtp
yara_rule: rule Detect_AgentTesla_SMTP_Exfil { meta: description="Detects Agent Tesla infostealer SMTP exfiltration" strings: $tesla1 = "AgentTesla" nocase $smtp1 = "smtp.gmail.com" $smtp2 = "MAIL FROM:" $key = "GetAsyncKeyState" $clip = "GetClipboardData" condition: ($tesla1 or ($smtp1 and $smtp2)) and ($key or $clip) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Générer une signature pour un malware qui modifie le fichier hosts pour rediriger le trafic
yara_rule: rule Detect_Hosts_File_Modification { meta: description="Detects malware modifying Windows hosts file" strings: $hosts = "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\drivers\\\\etc\\\\hosts" $write = "WriteFile" $redirect1 = "127.0.0.1" $redirect2 = "0.0.0.0" condition: $hosts and $write and ($redirect1 or $redirect2) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Create a detection rule that i need to detect a wiper malware that overwrites mbr to destroy the system
yara_rule: rule Detect_MBR_Wiper { meta: description="Detects MBR wiper malware" strings: $mbr = "\\\\.\\\\PhysicalDrive0" $write = "WriteFile" $zeros = { 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 } $wipe = "DeviceIoControl" condition: $mbr and ($write or $wipe) and $zeros }
label: malicious

query_nl: Écrire une règle qui détecte cobalt strike beacon utilisé par des attaquants apt
yara_rule: rule Detect_CobaltStrike_Beacon { meta: description="Detects Cobalt Strike beacon artifact" strings: $pipe = "\\\\.\\\\pipe\\\\msagent_" $cs1 = "beacon" nocase $cs2 = "cobaltstrike" nocase $sleep = { 48 83 EC 20 B8 01 00 00 00 } $config = { 69 68 69 68 69 6B } condition: ($pipe or $cs2 or $cs1) and ($sleep or $config) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Find files that dropper that extracts and runs an embedded executable from its resources
yara_rule: rule Detect_Resource_Dropper { meta: description="Detects dropper extracting PE from resources" strings: $res1 = "FindResource" $res2 = "LoadResource" $res3 = "LockResource" $write = "WriteFile" $exec = "CreateProcess" condition: pe.is_pe and 3 of ($res1, $res2, $res3) and $write and $exec }
label: malicious

query_nl: I need to identify a fileless malware that runs entirely in memory using reflective dll injection
yara_rule: rule Detect_Reflective_DLL_Injection { meta: description="Detects reflective DLL injection technique" strings: $reflect1 = "ReflectiveLoader" $reflect2 = { 52 65 66 6C 65 63 74 69 76 65 4C 6F 61 64 65 72 } $valloc = "VirtualAlloc" $nocrt = { 55 8B EC 83 EC } condition: ($reflect1 or $reflect2) and $valloc }
label: malicious

query_nl: I need to identify ransomware that creates a mutex to avoid double infection
yara_rule: rule Detect_Ransomware_Mutex { meta: description="Detects ransomware using mutex for single instance" strings: $mutex1 = "CreateMutex" $mutex2 = "Global\\\\" $encrypt = "CryptEncrypt" $note = "README" condition: $mutex1 and $mutex2 and ($encrypt or $note) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Construire une règle pour trouver un malware qui effectue un scan de ports sur le réseau local
yara_rule: rule Detect_Port_Scanner_Malware { meta: description="Detects port scanning malware behavior" strings: $sock = "socket" $connect = "connect" $range = /192\.168\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/ $scan = "portscan" nocase condition: $sock and $connect and ($range or $scan) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Find files that rule for detecting a macro-enabled word document that downloads a payload
yara_rule: rule Detect_Maldoc_Macro_Download { meta: description="Detects malicious macro Word document downloading payload" strings: $auto = "AutoOpen" $shell = "Shell" $wscript = "WScript.Shell" $dl = "DownloadFile" $url = /https?:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9.\/]{10,}/ condition: ($auto or $wscript) and ($shell or $dl) and $url }
label: malicious

query_nl: Je veux identifier un malware qui vole des mots de passe sauvegardés dans chrome
yara_rule: rule Detect_Chrome_Password_Stealer { meta: description="Detects Chrome saved password stealer" strings: $path1 = "\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\User Data" $path2 = "Login Data" $api = "CryptUnprotectData" $sqlite = "SELECT * FROM logins" condition: ($path1 or $path2) and ($api or $sqlite) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Create a detection rule that a macro excel file that runs powershell command on open
yara_rule: rule Detect_Excel_Macro_PowerShell { meta: description="Detects malicious Excel macro launching PowerShell" strings: $workbook = "Workbook_Open" $ps = "powershell" nocase $enc = "-encodedcommand" nocase $bypass = "-executionpolicy bypass" nocase condition: $workbook and $ps and ($enc or $bypass) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Créer une règle YARA pour un logiciel espion qui active la caméra et le microphone à distance
yara_rule: rule Detect_Camfecting_Spyware { meta: description="Detects spyware activating camera and microphone" strings: $cam1 = "capCreateCaptureWindow" $cam2 = "VideoCapture" $mic1 = "waveInOpen" $mic2 = "AudioRecord" $send = "send" condition: ($cam1 or $cam2) and ($mic1 or $mic2) and $send }
label: malicious

query_nl: I need to identify network worm spreading via eternalblue smb exploit like wannacry
yara_rule: rule Detect_EternalBlue_SMB_Exploit { meta: description="Detects EternalBlue SMB exploitation attempt" strings: $eb1 = { 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 } $smb = "SMB" $pipe = "\\\\IPC$" $exploit = { FC E8 82 00 00 00 60 89 E5 } condition: $smb and $pipe and ($eb1 or $exploit) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter les fichiers qui un malware qui utilise tor pour anonymiser ses communications c2
yara_rule: rule Detect_Tor_C2_Communication { meta: description="Detects malware using Tor for C2 anonymization" strings: $tor1 = ".onion" $tor2 = "127.0.0.1:9050" $tor3 = "tor" nocase $socks = "SOCKS5" condition: ($tor1 or $tor2) and ($tor3 or $socks) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Detect a ransomware that encrypts files and uses the string CryptEncrypt (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_WannaCry_CryptEncrypt { meta: description="Detects WannaCry ransomware via CryptEncrypt API" author="Manual" date="2026-01-10" strings: $api = "CryptEncrypt" $ext = ".WNCRY" $msg = "WannaCry" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and $api and ($ext or $msg) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un ransomware qui renomme les fichiers avec l'extension .locked (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_LockBit_Extension { meta: description="Detects LockBit via .locked extension" author="Manual" date="2026-01-10" strings: $ext1 = ".locked" fullword $ext2 = ".lockbit" fullword $note = "LockBit_Readme.txt" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Je veux détecter un virus qui se propage via clé USB et crée des fichiers autorun (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_USB_Worm_Autorun { meta: description="Detects USB worm using autorun.inf" strings: $autorun = "autorun.inf" nocase $open = "open=" $shell = "shell\\open\\command" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and $autorun and ($open or $shell) }
label: malicious

query_nl: detect a trojan that modifies the Windows registry for persistence at startup (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_Registry_Persistence { meta: description="Detects registry-based persistence mechanism" strings: $reg1 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Run" $reg2 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\RunOnce" $api = "RegSetValueEx" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and ($reg1 or $reg2) and $api }
label: malicious

query_nl: détecter un crypto-mineur qui utilise le CPU à fond pour miner du Monero (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_XMRig_Cryptominer { meta: description="Detects XMRig Monero CPU miner" strings: $xmr1 = "xmrig" nocase $xmr2 = "monero" nocase $pool = "pool.minexmr.com" $wallet = "donate.xmrig.com" $cpu = "--max-cpu-usage" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Detect ransomware that drops a ransom note named README.txt (PE executable only, filesize < 2MB)
yara_rule:
rule Detect_Ransom_Note_README { meta: description="Detects ransomware dropping README ransom note" strings: $note1 = "README.txt" $note2 = "YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN ENCRYPTED" nocase $note3 = "bitcoin" nocase $note4 = "BTC" condition:
        pe.is_pe and filesize < 2MB and $note1 and ($note2 or $note3 or $note4) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Détecter un ransomware qui chiffre les fichiers
yara_rule: rule Detect_Ransom_Note_README { meta: description="Detects ransomware dropping README ransom note" strings: $note1 = "README.txt" $note2 = "YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN ENCRYPTED" nocase $note3 = "bitcoin" nocase $note4 = "BTC" condition: $note1 and ($note2 or $note3 or $note4) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Rilevare un trojan che modifica il registro di Windows per la persistenza
yara_rule: rule Detect_Registry_Persistence { meta: description="Detects registry-based persistence mechanism" strings: $reg1 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Run" $reg2 = "SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\RunOnce" $api = "RegSetValueEx" condition: ($reg1 or $reg2) and $api }
label: malicious

query_nl: اكتشاف برامج تجسس تلتقط لقطات الشاشة وترسلها إلى خادم بعيد
yara_rule: rule Detect_Screenshot_Spyware { meta: description="Detects spyware capturing screenshots" strings: $api1 = "BitBlt" $api2 = "GetDesktopWindow" $api3 = "CreateCompatibleBitmap" $send = "send" $ftp = "ftp" nocase condition: 2 of ($api1, $api2, $api3) and ($send or $ftp) }
label: malicious

query_nl: Règle YARA pour détecter le botnet Mirai sur des appareils IoT
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mirai_Botnet { meta: description="Detects Mirai botnet IoT malware" strings: $str1 = "/bin/busybox" $str2 = "MIRAI" $str3 = "telnet" $kill = "kill" $exec = "/bin/sh" condition: $str1 and ($str2 or ($str3 and $kill and $exec)) }
label: malicious

query_nl: تحديد ملف يستخدم Mimikatz لاستخراج بيانات الاعتماد من LSASS
yara_rule: rule Detect_Mimikatz_Credential_Dump { meta: description="Detects Mimikatz credential dumping tool" strings: $mimi1 = "mimikatz" nocase $mimi2 = "sekurlsa" nocase $lsass = "lsass" nocase $priv = "privilege::debug" nocase $pass = "sekurlsa::logonpasswords" nocase condition: any of them }
label: malicious

query_nl: Normal ZIP archive containing only documents
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_ZIP { meta: description="Clean ZIP archive" strings: $zip = { 50 4B 03 04 } $no_exe = ".exe" $no_dll = ".dll" condition: $zip at 0 and not $no_exe and not $no_dll }
label: benign

query_nl: Fichier log système Windows standard sans activité malveillante
yara_rule: rule Benign_Windows_Log { meta: description="Identifies benign Windows event log" strings: $evtx = { 45 6C 66 46 69 6C 65 00 } $ms = "Microsoft-Windows" condition: $evtx at 0 and $ms }
label: benign

query_nl: Legitimate Python pip package installer script
yara_rule: rule Benign_Pip_Installer { meta: description="Identifies legitimate pip installer" strings: $pip = "pip install" $setup = "setup.py" $pypi = "pypi.org" condition: ($pip or $setup) and $pypi and not "exec(" }
label: benign

query_nl: Fichier de configuration Nginx sans instructions suspectes
yara_rule: rule Benign_Nginx_Config { meta: description="Identifies clean Nginx config" strings: $nginx = "nginx" $server = "server {" $no_lua = "lua_code" condition: $nginx and $server and not $no_lua }
label: benign

query_nl: Normal HTML webpage with no embedded scripts or iframes
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_HTML { meta: description="Identifies benign HTML page" strings: $html = "<!DOCTYPE html" $no_js = "<script" $no_iframe = "<iframe" $no_eval = "eval(" condition: $html and not $no_js and not $no_iframe and not $no_eval }
label: benign

query_nl: Certificate file PEM or CRT format for HTTPS
yara_rule: rule Benign_SSL_Certificate { meta: description="Identifies SSL/TLS certificate file" strings: $pem = "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----" $end = "-----END CERTIFICATE-----" condition: $pem and $end and filesize < 10KB }
label: benign

query_nl: Fichier CSV contenant des données tabulaires sans code exécutable
yara_rule: rule Benign_CSV_Data_File { meta: description="Identifies benign CSV data file" strings: $no_pe = { 4D 5A } $no_php = "<?php" $no_ps = "powershell" condition: not $no_pe at 0 and not $no_php and not $no_ps and filesize < 50MB }
label: benign

query_nl: Standard Windows batch file for system backup
yara_rule: rule Benign_Backup_Batch { meta: description="Identifies benign backup batch script" strings: $xcopy = "xcopy" $backup = "backup" $no_del = "del /f /s" $no_reg = "reg delete" condition: ($xcopy and $backup) and not $no_del and not $no_reg }
label: benign

query_nl: Fichier audio MP3 standard sans données cachées
yara_rule: rule Benign_Clean_MP3 { meta: description="Identifies clean MP3 audio file" strings: $id3 = { 49 44 33 } $mp3 = { FF FB } $no_pe = { 4D 5A } condition: ($id3 at 0 or $mp3 at 0) and not $no_pe }
label: benign

query_nl: Legitimate Docker container configuration file
yara_rule: rule Benign_Dockerfile { meta: description="Identifies benign Dockerfile" strings: $from = "FROM " $run = "RUN " $no_nc = "netcat" $no_rev = "bash -i" condition: $from and $run and not $no_nc and not $no_rev }
label: benign
